source: ### Read data from external storage account using Managed Identity

#Read from data lake(External Storage) using Managed Identity

#Provide Storage blob data contributor access to the synapse workspace idenitity

# Ensure the path matches the account name above
path = "abfss://bankdata@inceptezadlsbankdata.dfs.core.windows.net/bank_txns.csv"

df = spark.read.format("csv") \
    .option("header", True) \
    .option("inferSchema", True) \
    .load(path)
df.show()
1. ### Read data from external storage account using linkedservice

# set the linkedservice
spark.conf.set("spark.storage.synapse.inceptezadlsbankdata.linkedServiceName", "AzureDataLakeStorage1")


path = "abfss://bankdata@inceptezadlsbankdata.dfs.core.windows.net/bank_txns.csv"

df = spark.read.format("csv") \
    .option("header", True) \
    .option("inferSchema", True) \
    .load(path)
df.show()

# set the linkedservice
spark.conf.set("spark.storage.synapse.inceptezloandata.linkedServiceName", "ls_loandata")


path = "abfss://loandata@inceptezloandata.dfs.core.windows.net/loan_txns.csv"

df = spark.read.format("csv") \
    .option("header", True) \
    .option("inferSchema", True) \
    .load(path)
df.show()
### Read data from external storage account using SAS token

sas_token = "?sv=2025-11-05&ss=bfqt&srt=sco&sp=rwdlacupyx&se=2026-04-16T10:35:02Z&st=2026-04-16T02:20:02Z&spr=https&sig=FH9pQzJMkmO%2Fef9G2V88QL21WBTL9qfmU5IhHvJlHWk%3D"

spark.conf.set(f"fs.azure.account.auth.type.inceptezloandata.dfs.core.windows.net", "SAS")
spark.conf.set(f"fs.azure.sas.token.provider.type.inceptezloandata.dfs.core.windows.net", 
               "com.microsoft.azure.synapse.tokenlibrary.ConfBasedSASProvider")
spark.conf.set(f"spark.storage.synapse.loandata.inceptezloandata.dfs.core.windows.net.sas", sas_token)

path = "abfss://loandata@inceptezloandata.dfs.core.windows.net/loan_txns.csv"

df = spark.read.format("csv") \
    .option("header", True) \
    .option("inferSchema", True) \
    .load(path)
df.show()

sas_token = "?sv=2025-11-05&ss=bfqt&srt=sco&sp=rwdlacupyx&se=2026-04-16T10:38:00Z&st=2026-04-16T02:23:00Z&spr=https&sig=NmnH%2BI2s5FYRvFCOd0cDP6uAKPZ4IQ%2BS1Vx%2F8s7ezOk%3D"

spark.conf.set(f"fs.azure.account.auth.type.inceptezloandata.dfs.core.windows.net", "SAS")
spark.conf.set(f"fs.azure.sas.token.provider.type.inceptezloandata.dfs.core.windows.net", 
               "com.microsoft.azure.synapse.tokenlibrary.ConfBasedSASProvider")
spark.conf.set(f"spark.storage.synapse.loandata.inceptezloandata.dfs.core.windows.net.sas", sas_token)

path = "abfss://bankdata@inceptezadlsbankdata.dfs.core.windows.net/bank_txns.csv"

df = spark.read.format("csv") \
    .option("header", True) \
    .option("inferSchema", True) \
    .load(path)
df.show()
